name: Create AI Instagram carousel posts with Gemini, Slack and Google Sheets
description: This workflow automatically generates a 6-slide Instagram carousel about tech topics(you can edit the prompt how you like to make it for best for your usecase)  every day at noon(you can set whatever time you want or manually use it), creates images for each slide using AI, uploads them to Slack with captions, and logs the topic to Google Sheets to avoid repeating subjects.
